channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Private jets collide at Scottsdale Airport in Arizona, killing at least 1 person, authorities say
item.description: At least one person was killed and others were injured when private jets collided Monday afternoon at the Scottsdale Airport in Arizona, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Venezuela sends 2 planes to US to return migrants, signaling a potential improvement in relations
item.description: McALLEN, Texas (AP) — Two Venezuelan planes flew to the United States on Monday and returned home with deported Venezuelans, signaling a possible improvement in relations between longtime diplomatic adversaries and a victory for President Donald Trump in his efforts to get more countries to take the
item.dc:creator: VALERIE GONZALEZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump steps up his 2018 tariffs on steel and aluminum, risking inflation on promise of more jobs
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump on Monday removed the exceptions and exemptions from his 2018 tariffs on steel, meaning that all steel imports will be taxed at a minimum of 25%. Trump also hiked his 2018 aluminum tariffs to 25% from 10%.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: What the Westminster show dogs' names mean
item.description: They have names that could make a random password generator cry uncle. Meet, for example, GCHG CH Calicops Sassafras Gonnakikurass. “She’s a saucy girl. Her name says it all,” Fred Ortiz said as he groomed the Brussels griffon to compete Monday at the Westminster Kennel Club dog show.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Hawaii court rules against insurance companies in Maui wildfire, allowing $4B settlement to proceed
item.description: HONOLULU (AP) — Hawaii’s Supreme Court ruled Monday that insurance companies can’t bring their own legal actions against those blamed for Maui’s catastrophic 2023 wildfire, allowing a $4 billion settlement that was on that the verge of collapse to proceed.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER SINCO KELLEHER, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Trader Joe's, Smith's limit daily egg purchases due to nationwide shortages
item.description: Trader Joe's is limiting egg sales to one dozen per customer daily -- and it is not the only company doing so.
item.dc:creator: Aubree B. Jennings, ABC 4

item.title: US judge keeps Trump plan to push out federal workers on hold
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — President Donald Trump's plan to downsize the federal workforce remains on hold after a courtroom hearing on Monday afternoon. It's the latest example of how the Republican president's ambitious plans have become ensnared in the judicial system. U.S. District Judge George O’Toole Jr.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY and CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Combat your post-Super Bowl fatigue with these freebies, discounts
item.description: Even though the Super Bowl is over, several restaurants and chains are offering freebies to help football fans recover from Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, Fox 5

item.title: Private jets collide at Scottsdale Airport in Arizona, killing at least 1 person, authorities say
item.description: At least one person was killed and others were injured when private jets collided Monday afternoon at the Scottsdale Airport in Arizona, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jet owned by Mötley Crüe's Vince Neil involved in fatal plane crash at Scottsdale Airport in Arizona
item.description: At least one person was killed when a plane veered off the runway and crashed into another plane at Scottsdale Airport in Arizona on Monday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No, you won't get your student loans forgiven if DOGE violated FERPA
item.description: No, you won't get your student loans forgiven if DOGE violated FERPA, even though TikTok videos are claiming otherwise.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: Labor unions sue to block DOGE access to sensitive information at US agencies
item.description: A coalition of labor unions filed a lawsuit Monday asking a federal court to stop Elon Musk’s team from accessing private data at the Education Department, the Treasury Department and the Office of Personnel Management.
item.dc:creator: Collin Binkley, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: FEMA says it's halting payments for migrant housing in New York after Musk blasts money for hotels
item.description: The acting head of the federal agency responsible for responding to disasters says he’s suspending payments sent to New York City to house migrants and that staff who made them will be held accountable.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Santana And Cedar Attanasio, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Virginia court overturns felony convictions against Tiger King star 'Doc' Antle
item.description: "Doc" Antle was convicted in June 2023 on two counts each of purchasing an endangered species and conspiracy to sell or purchase an endangered species.
item.dc:creator: Adam Benson, NewsNation

item.title: Super Bowl 'flu'? Record number didn't go to work Monday, poll suggests
item.description: “May be calling out sick tomorrow,” one Eagles supporter wrote on X on Sunday night. “Got that birds flu.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, NewsNation

item.title: Trump administration moves to shut down Consumer Financial Protection Bureau
item.description: The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau is likely the next federal agency on the chopping block as President Donald Trump and Elon Musk continue the DOGE agenda to shrink the size of the federal government.
item.dc:creator: Raquel Martin, WFLA, NBC

item.title: American tourists attacked by shark at luxe Bahamas resort area
item.description: Police are investigating after two female American tourists were apparently involved in a shark attack at a popular Bahamas resort over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hoarder arrested for extreme animal cruelty, as authorities discover 10 dead pets, rescue many more: police
item.description: A Long Island woman was arrested and charged with animal cruelty and other charges after a search warrant on her residence revealed unlivable conditions for dozens of animals.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Prosecutor says Salman Rushdie was too stunned to react when a man started to stab him
item.description: MAYVILLE, N.Y. (AP) — Salman Rushdie was so stunned when a masked man started to stab him on a stage in western New York that the author didn't even try to fight back, a prosecutor said Monday during opening statements in the suspect's attempted murder trial.
item.dc:creator: CAROLYN THOMPSON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump says he’s in ‘no rush’ to develop Gaza
item.description: “Think of it as a big real estate site, and the United States is going to own it, and will slowly, very slowly, we’re in no rush, in development,” Trump told reporters.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Deputies reunite with family they saved from crash with stolen vehicle
item.description: “It was a mother and two children. At which point I drove in front of the vehicle causing the vehicle to crash into me," said Connor Lacey.
item.dc:creator: Alliyah Sims, NewsNation

item.title: So long, penny! Trump orders US to ditch 1-cent coin after decades of complaints
item.description: RICHMOND, Va. (AP) — The lowly penny, the forgotten mainstay of coin jars and car cupholders everywhere, may soon be no more. President Donald Trump announced Sunday he’s ordered his administration to cease production of the 1-cent coin, whose buying power is long past its prime.
item.dc:creator: ALAN SUDERMAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Brother of Parkland shooter arrested for trespassing at three schools
item.description: Surveillance footage recovered from Jan. 25 showed him attempting to open exterior doors and peering into the schools.
item.dc:creator: Ciara Sutherland, NewsNation

item.title: Family of Chesapeake man missing since last July still hoping for answers
item.description: "He's been gone six months now, and it's just hard to go on without him," Cynthia Wolf, Bill Wolf's wife said.
item.dc:creator: Cheyenne Pagan, NewsNation

item.title: AI puts critical thinking skills at risk, Microsoft researchers find
item.description: Quick, without looking at your phone, what's your spouse's phone number? What about the number for your parents, or children, or siblings, or best friend? Chances are that you only know, at most, a few of those people's phone numbers by heart, but just a couple decades ago, you'd have known all of t
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Combat your post-Super Bowl fatigue with these freebies, discounts
item.description: Even though the Super Bowl is over, several restaurants and chains are offering freebies to help football fans recover from Sunday. Here’s what you need to know. Starbucks The coffee chain is offering its rewards members a free tall hot or iced brewed coffee any time during “Starbucks Monday.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump has unleashed chaos by distraction upon the international community. That's no accident
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The Saudis are furious. The Danes are scrambling. Colombia has backed down. Mexico and Canada stand in a purgatory between tariff wars with the US and … not. China has retaliated, launching a trade war between the economic superpowers.
item.dc:creator: LAURIE KELLMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Third judge blocks Trump birthright citizenship executive order
item.description: A third federal judge indefinitely blocked President Trump’s executive order to restrict birthright citizenship, dealing another stark blow to the controversial directive. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump says he is serious about Canada becoming 51st state in Super Bowl interview
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump said he is serious about wanting Canada to become the 51st state in an interview that aired Sunday during the Super Bowl preshow.
item.dc:creator: JILL COLVIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Court grants request to block detained Venezuelan immigrants from being sent to Guantanamo
item.description: ALBUQUERQUE, N.M. (AP) — A federal court on Sunday blocked the Trump administration from sending three Venezuelan immigrants held in New Mexico to Guantanamo Bay Naval Base in Cuba as part of the president's immigration crackdown.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump says 25 percent tariffs on steel and aluminum coming Monday
item.description: Trump said that the steel and aluminum tariffs would impact “everybody” when asked what countries would be affected.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, WGN 9

item.title: What makes a dog a winner? A Westminster Kennel Club judge explains
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The competitors can come in forms as different as a Chihuahua, a great Dane, a bulldog and a greyhound. Each one is a champion.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: A tax credit worth up to $7,830 often goes unclaimed: See who qualifies for the EITC
item.description: The IRS estimates that a fifth of eligible taxpayers fail to take advantage of the tax break each year.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, Fox 5
